code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    process(line)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end

fn process(_ line: String) -> Unit
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut prev = 0
  mut have_prev = false
  mut out = ""
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut num = 0

  while i <= n
    mut c = 32
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        c = b
      when None
        c = 32
      end
    end

    let is_ws = c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 13 or c == 10

    if is_ws
      if in_num
        let val = sign * num
        if not have_prev
          out = "#{val}"
          prev = val
          have_prev = true
        else if val != prev
          out = "#{out} #{val}"
          prev = val
        end
        in_num = false
        num = 0
        sign = 1
      end
    else
      if not in_num
        in_num = true
        num = 0
        sign = 1
        if c == 45
          sign = -1
        else if c == 43
          sign = 1
        else if c >= 48 and c <= 57
          num = c - 48
        end
      else
        if c >= 48 and c <= 57
          num = num * 10 + (c - 48)
        end
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  println(out)
end
